name: kelulusan/pengumuman-app
description: Aplikasi Pengumuman Kelulusan Siswa - Astro SSG

scripts-descriptions.dev: Jalankan Astro dev server (http://localhost:4321) — PHP server harus aktif dulu via php-server
scripts-descriptions.php-server: Jalankan PHP built-in server di port 8090 (wajib aktif agar API bekerja saat dev)
scripts-descriptions.build: Build production static files ke folder /dist
scripts-descriptions.seed: Isi data dummy ke database untuk testing
scripts-descriptions.export-data: Export data MySQL ke public/data.json (NISN ter-hash)
scripts-descriptions.db:setup: Setup lengkap: migrate + seed + export (pertama kali)
scripts-descriptions.publish: Export data terbaru + build production (workflow deploy)
scripts-descriptions.deploy: Generate data JSON, build production, dan buat file zip siap deploy ke hosting
